title: ferray-random: shuffle/permuted only work on 1D arrays
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's Generator.shuffle(x, axis=0) shuffles rows of a 2D array (or slices along any axis). Generator.permuted(x, axis=0) independently permutes along an axis. ferray-random's shuffle and permuted only accept Array<T, Ix1>. The permuted method takes _axis: usize but ignores it (underscore prefix). For ND arrays, users need row/column shuffling — e.g., shuffling training examples that are rows of a feature matrix. Extend to accept Array<T, IxDyn> with an axis parameter.
